nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy fog after 4am. Mostly cloudy. Low around 56, with temperatures rising to around 58 overnight. Southwest wind 5 to 10 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy fog before 11am, then a slight chance of drizzle between 2pm and 3pm, then patchy fog and a slight chance of drizzle between 3pm and 4pm, then patchy fog and a slight chance of thunderstorms and a slight chance of drizzle between 4pm and 5pm, then patchy fog and a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy. High near 56, with temperatures falling to around 43 in the afternoon. North wind 5 to 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms likely before 7pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 7pm and 8pm, then showers and thunderstorms between 8pm and 10pm, then patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms between 10pm and 4am, then patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could be severe. Cloudy, with a low around 41. North northeast wind 10 to 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.shortForecast: Patchy Fog then Chance Rain And Snow Showers
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms before 4pm, then a chance of rain and snow showers. Some of the storms could be severe. Cloudy, with a high near 42. North northwest wind 10 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 35 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.shortForecast: Chance Rain And Snow Showers then Partly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain and snow showers before 7pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 29. Northwest wind 5 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 35 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 47.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely after 7pm. Cloudy, with a low around 40.

nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely before 7am. Partly sunny, with a high near 50.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 32.

nws.name: Saturday

nws.name: Saturday Night

nws.name: Sunday

nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers before 1pm, then rain and snow showers likely. Cloudy, with a high near 45.
